abstract.t: This specification describes a media container format for encoded and encrypted audio and video media data to be used primarily for interactive Media over QUIC Transport (MOQT) [MoQTransport], with the goal of it being a low-overhead format. It further defines the LOC Streaming Format for the MOQ Common Catalog format [MoQCatalog] for publishers to annouce and describe their LOC tracks and for subscribers to consume them. The specification also provides examples to aid application developers for building media applications over MOQT and intending to use LOC as the streaming format.
